scenarioName: Tie every executable file to a file-body contract

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Tie every executable file to a file-body contract
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The analysis should list every owning body contract, identify files with no declaring body contract as 'file-body-contract-missing', and provide a recommended fix that names the authorizing contract or owned package boundary.
steps.observedResult: Only the Gherkin scenario definition was provided, which describes the expected behavior but does not contain any observed results from an actual test execution.
